title: eulophia krebsii
intro: Eulophia krebsii, also known as the 'Krebs' orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid species native to tropical Africa. Traditionally, the plant has been used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Eulophia krebsii include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antidote for snake bites. In herbal preparations, the roots and rhizomes of the plant are often used to create decoctions and infusions, although more research is needed to fully understand the plant's effects and potential interactions.
